name: autocode
description: 38 professional skills for Claude Code. Anyone can build software. No coding required. Persistent memory, auto-quality, 60%+ token savings.
author: I-Lang Research, Eastsoft Inc.

hooks.prompt: Session paused. Do a FULL REVIEW of the entire project from the beginning, then update .autocode/memory.md. Sections: ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next, ## User. Record decisions, state, user preferences and mistakes learned. Merge with existing content. Max 200 lines. Compressed syntax. Write the file now.

Context compacting. Do a FULL REVIEW from the beginning, then save everything important to .autocode/memory.md. Include ## Project, ## Decisions, ## State, ## Next, ## User. Merge with existing. Max 200 lines. Write now.
